title: Agent
description: A role that can take actions within the studio. Agents have archetypes defining their behavioral patterns, capabilities defining what they can do, and constraints defining their boundaries.

id.description: Unique identifier for this agent within the studio

description.description: What this agent does and why it exists

archetypes.description: Behavioral patterns this agent implements. An agent may implement multiple archetypes (e.g., a Lorekeeper might be both curator and researcher)

is_entry_agent.description: If true, this agent is the customer-facing entry point. Only entry agents communicate directly with external customers. A studio should have exactly one entry agent.

capabilities.description: What this agent can do (tools, permissions, actions)

constraints.description: What this agent cannot do (boundaries, prohibitions)

exclusive_stores.description: Stores that only this agent can write to. Other agents may read but not write. Used for canonical knowledge curation.

knowledge_requirements.description: What knowledge this agent needs access to

system_prompt_template.description: Optional template for the agent's system prompt. May include placeholders for knowledge injection.

flow_control_override.description: Override studio flow control defaults for this specific agent

constitution.description: Whether this agent receives the studio constitution (almost always true)

must_know.description: IDs of must-know knowledge entries to include in system prompt

role_specific.description: IDs of role-specific knowledge entries for this agent

can_lookup.description: IDs of knowledge entries this agent can query via tools

flow_control_override.description: Override studio flow control defaults for this specific agent. Use this to tune capacity (e.g., orchestrator may handle more concurrent delegations than a specialized creator).

max_inbox_size.description: Override max inbox size for this agent

max_active_delegations.description: Override max concurrent delegations for this agent

accepts_delegations.description: If false, this agent cannot receive new delegations (useful for temporarily pausing an agent)

priority_boost.description: Boost (positive) or penalize (negative) this agent's messages in recipient inboxes. Higher priority messages survive summarization longer.
